name: netjson-diagrams-monorepo
description: Build/deploy orchestration for the netjson-diagrams library + web brochure. deploy → netlify (apps/web), release → tarballs into the central _releases/ feed.

scripts.build:lib: npm run pin:wasm && cd packages/netjson-diagrams && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:lib && make web-runtime && cd apps/web && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.release: npm run build:lib && mkdir -p ../../../_releases/npm && npm pack ./packages/netjson-diagrams --pack-destination ../../../_releases/npm && npm pack ./packages/netjson-diagrams-cli --pack-destination ../../../_releases/npm
